hooks.command: node -e "const p=JSON.parse(process.env.CLAUDE_HOOK_CONTEXT||'{}'); const f=p.tool_input?.file_path||''; if(f.endsWith('/claims.json')||f.endsWith('/compilation.json')){process.stderr.write('BLOCKED: Direct writes to claims.json and compilation.json are not allowed. Use wheat MCP tools.\n');process.exit(1)}"
